data.name: Mix Hentai Girls
data.detailed_description:
There is no meaning of life without waifus, Mix Hentai Girls is a game to elevate you mood in the best way, with hentai, girls and relaxing music.

Game features:

  • Cute kawaii girls
  • Lo-Fi music
  • Adult mode
  • Gallery
  • Panic button
  • Achievements
  • Cloud saving
  • NSFW
  • Can be played with one hand ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)

We are working hard now to provide workshop support and PvP/Battle royale mode.

data.short_description: Puzzle game to relax and enjoy your life in the best manner

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.7+
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Debian 8
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
